title: Wall Street Taps Australia’s Pension Trillions as AI Spend Soars

title: E-Power Inc. Announces Strategic Expansion into Vietnam to Build a Resilient "Ex-China" Anode Material Supply Chain for Global AI Data Centers and ESS Markets
description: DOVER, USA, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- E-Power Inc. ('E-Power”, the 'Company”, 'we” or 'our”) (NASDAQ: EPOW), a global leader in energy storage battery anode materials and integrated microgrid solutions, today announced a significant milestone in its global expansion strategy following a successful high-level site inspection of the ATSC SOLARTECH facility in Hung Yen Province, Vietnam. This initiative aligns with the Company’s 'Closed-Loop' industrial ecosystem, focusing on localized production to serve the rapidly growing Artificial Intelligence Data Center (AIDC) and energy storage markets in North America and Southeast Asia.
